title: Beacon Totems
description:
In This mod you can create Travel sized Beacons. 

!REQUIRES THE CURIOUS API!
body:
Again, this mod requires the CURIOUS API!

In This mod you can create Beacon Totems with a now ore called Agonite. It must be smelted into Agonite ingots and crafted with Nether Star Shards (made from a Nether Star), and either Redstone, a Rabbit Foot, or a Gold Ingot to create the desired effect.

Strength Totem - gives a continuous effect of Strength

Jump Boost Totem - gives a continuous effect of Jump Boost

Health Totem - gives a continuous effect of Regeneration 

Totem Relic - this Beacon Totem must be traded with Master Weapon Smith. it will give an effect of Speed, Resistance, and Absorption as long as you have a sword in your main hand.
